import React from 'react'; import './AboutMe.css'; function AboutMe() { return (

🧥 About Crews Clothing

Welcome to CREWS Clothing – your one-stop destination for stylish, comfortable, and affordable clothing! We offer a wide range of shirts, pants, and trendy outfits to fit every occasion. Whether you're looking for casuals, formals, or fashion-forward streetwear – we’ve got you covered.

🎯 Our Mission

To provide high-quality clothing at budget-friendly prices and deliver excellent customer satisfaction. We believe fashion should be for everyone – so we bring the best to your doorstep with a personal touch.

📦 What We Offer

  • 👕 Premium Shirts & T-Shirts
  • 👖 Classic & Modern Pants
  • 🚚 Fast & Free Shipping
  • 💬 Friendly WhatsApp Support

📞 Contact Us

For queries or orders, reach us on WhatsApp anytime.

); } export default AboutMe;
